# CODEBASE INVENTORY

## Scope
- This inventory covers the `training-env/` module only.
- This is a factual-only structural inventory with no recommendations.
- Generated artifacts, virtual environments, git internals, pytest caches, and Python `__pycache__` directories were excluded from the inspected surface.

## Method
This inventory is based on static inspection of:
- current workspace files under `training-env/`
- directories
- file names and extensions
- package and module layout
- config surfaces
- script entrypoints
- documentation and test surfaces where relevant

Also state:
- Confirmed means directly supported by repository evidence.
- Inferred means reasonable but not directly proven.
- Unknown means purpose could not be confidently determined.

## Top-Level Repository Map

| Path | Type | Category | Purpose | Confidence |
|------|------|----------|---------|------------|
| training-env/.gitignore | File | misc | Tracked repository file in the scoped module. | Confirmed |
| training-env/README.md | File | docs | Module or submodule overview and usage guide. | Confirmed |
| training-env/analysis | Directory | misc | Repository directory with module support content. | Confirmed |
| training-env/docs | Directory | misc | Repository directory with module support content. | Confirmed |
| training-env/fixtures | Directory | misc | Repository directory with module support content. | Confirmed |
| training-env/rl | Directory | misc | Repository directory with module support content. | Confirmed |
| training-env/sim | Directory | misc | Repository directory with module support content. | Confirmed |

## Key Execution Surfaces

- `training-env/sim/`: Kotlin/Gradle headless simulation runtime and associated data/config surface.
- `training-env/rl/fight_caves_rl/`: Primary Python RL package covering env backends, bridge, trainer, replay, rewards, and contracts.
- `training-env/rl/configs/`: RL benchmark, train, eval, reward, curriculum, and logging presets.
- `training-env/rl/scripts/`: Operational entrypoints for train, eval, replay, smoke, and benchmark workflows.
- `training-env/sim/game/src/test/kotlin/`: Simulator-side automated validation suites.
- `training-env/rl/fight_caves_rl/tests/`: RL-side unit/smoke/integration/determinism/performance test surfaces.
- `training-env/docs/`: Training-env level documentation.
